name: regime_rotator
description: BEP-20 Regime Rotator Skill v2. Generates institutional-grade trading strategies for BEP-20 tokens using real CoinMarketCap Skill Hub MCP intelligence (33 cloud-executed analytical skills: macro regime, KOL sentiment, derivatives, on-chain metrics, narrative rotation, chart patterns). Compiles natural language investment theses into backtestable VectorBT strategy specs with dynamic AMM slippage modeling.

investment_thesis.description: Natural language investment thesis authored by human.

target_assets.description: List of BEP-20 target assets to evaluate.

risk_tolerance.description: Risk tolerance profile (e.g., low, medium, high).

job_id.description: Optional ERC-8183 Job ID to verify escrow funding on-chain.

strategy_spec.description: The compiled machine-readable JSON backtestable strategy spec with Skill Hub intelligence metadata.

skill_hub_skills_used.description: List of CMC Skill Hub skills that were executed during compilation.
